objective: Reconcile post-merge repository authority, audit current production gaps, classify test evidence, and update the sole active production program into a dependency-ordered roadmap without changing product runtime behavior.
success_criteria: Every current authority document routes new work from merged main rather than draft PR #23.
One machine-readable issue vector and one human workstream map cover credible P0/P1/P2 boundaries.
The sole active roadmap defines phases 1.1 through 1.n and later release/pilot phases with exact gates.
The broad red unit aggregate is represented honestly and classified separately from curated green gates.
No competing current plan is created and no historical record is silently rewritten.
Applicable repository governance, Standard, plan, type/lint, and documentation archaeology checks pass on the final branch head.
forbidden_files: Hermes image, baseline, launcher, profile, session, gateway, capability, or derived UI source
required_tests: Main Integration Gates on the final pull-request head
known_blockers: The connected GitHub interface cannot execute local npm commands; final executable verification must come from GitHub Actions.

The broad npm run test:unit aggregate is known red on the cutover evidence head and is deliberately planned as Phase 1.1 implementation work rather than falsely reported green in this planning-only pass.
